module_1_listing_monitor.name: Listing Monitor
module_1_listing_monitor.description: Detects newly published vehicle listings from private sellers on Leboncoin
logic: Scrape Leboncoin vehicle category with filters
Filter: private sellers only — exclude professionals
Filter: functional vehicles only — exclude damaged/non-running
Optional geographic filtering (city, radius)
Keyword exclusion (accidenté, panne, pour pièces, HS, épave)
Deduplication check against processed listings database
New listings → pass to Module 2
module_1_listing_monitor.output: Qualified listing objects (title, price, URL, seller, location, description)

module_2_qualification.name: Qualification Engine
module_2_qualification.description: Analyzes listing content to determine if the vehicle is a valid prospect
logic: Parse title + description
Keyword scoring: positive (bon état, CT OK, faible km) vs negative (accidenté, moteur HS)
AI classification for ambiguous descriptions
Score threshold → qualified or rejected
Rejected listings logged with rejection reason for traceability
module_2_qualification.output: Qualified leads → Module 3 | Rejected → Log database

module_3_messaging.name: Messaging Automation
module_3_messaging.description: Engages sellers via Leboncoin internal messaging to obtain phone number
logic: Login to Leboncoin seller account (session management)
Send personalized first message using listing details (vehicle name, price, location)
Monitor inbox for seller replies
Parse reply content — detect phone number or continue conversation
Conditional reply logic based on seller response
Phone number detected → stop automation on that thread → Module 4
No reply after X hours → send follow-up (max 1)
Manage multiple parallel conversations simultaneously

message_templates.first_contact: Bonjour, je suis intéressé par votre {vehicle} à {price}. Est-il toujours disponible ? Pourriez-vous me contacter par téléphone pour en discuter ?
message_templates.follow_up: Bonjour, je me permets de relancer — seriez-vous disponible pour un échange rapide par téléphone ?
message_templates.customization: AI-assisted personalization based on listing details

module_4_phone_extraction.name: Phone Number Extraction
module_4_phone_extraction.description: Detects, validates, and processes phone numbers from conversations
logic: Regex scan on every incoming message
Detect French phone formats: 06/07, +33, with/without spaces/dots
Validate: 10 digits, mobile prefix check
Duplicate check against existing leads
Valid number → deactivate thread automation → Module 5
module_4_phone_extraction.output: Validated phone number + conversation thread → Module 5

module_5_lead_creation.name: Lead Creation + Notification
module_5_lead_creation.description: Creates structured lead record and sends real-time notification

ai_processing.data_cleanup: Standardize vehicle details, format phone number
ai_processing.reply_optimization: Suggest best follow-up approach based on conversation tone

infrastructure.database: SQLite or Postgres for dedup + tracking
infrastructure.ai: Claude API or GPT for qualification + summaries

error_handling.dead_letter_queue: Failed items stored for manual review

scalability.multiple_accounts: Support for N accounts with rotation
scalability.conversation_parallelism: Up to 15 simultaneous threads per account

timeline.week_1: Listing monitor + qualification engine + deduplication database
timeline.week_2: Messaging automation + phone extraction + stealth layer
timeline.week_3: Lead creation + CRM + notifications + AI summaries + full testing
